markdownRemark.excerpt: Update firmware Check TRIM is enabled AHCI mode Disable hibernation (powercfg -h off) Install Intel Remote Storage Tools Disable page file? Turn off auto defrag…
markdownRemark.html:
• Update firmware
  • Check TRIM is enabled
  • AHCI mode
  • Disable hibernation (powercfg -h off)
  • Install Intel Remote Storage Tools
  • Disable page file?
  • Turn off auto defrag (automatically disabled in Windows 7+?)
  • Turn off superfetch (optional, automatically disabled in Windows 7+?)
  • Set up backups
